Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: A student or training participant who completed the 21CLD MCE Calibration Challenge.

displayName.description: User's full name or greeting handle.

score.description: The final calibration score out of 1000 points.

timeUsed.description: Duration in seconds taken to complete the exam.

tabSwitchCount.description: The number of times the user switched tabs or clicked away during the calibration test.

antiCheatViolated.description: True if the user crossed the allowed tab-switching limit.

/participants/{participantId}.description: Persistent record of calibration challenge score for leaderboard and administrative dashboards.
